assertions.name: Uses ShaderUtil.GetShaderData
assertions.text: Uses ShaderUtil.GetShaderData to extract shader pass metadata
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs line 29: `ShaderData shaderData = ShaderUtil.GetShaderData(shader);` — directly calls the public Editor API.

assertions.name: Iterates subshaders and passes with global passIndex
assertions.text: Iterates through all subshaders and their passes, building a global passIndex across all subshaders
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 32-52: nested loop `for (int sub = 0; sub < shaderData.SubshaderCount; sub++)` / `for (int local = 0; local < subShader.PassCount; local++)` with `passIndex++` at line 51 tracking the global index.

assertions.name: Extracts LightMode tag via FindTagValue reflection
assertions.text: Extracts LightMode tag from each pass (via FindTagValue reflection or similar)
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 112-124: `GetLightModeTag` method uses `pass.GetType().GetMethod("FindTagValue")` then invokes it with `new ShaderTagId("LightMode")`. Called on line 38.

assertions.name: PassType guessing logic handles ShadowCaster/Meta/Deferred
assertions.text: Has PassType guessing logic based on passName/lightMode (e.g. ShadowCaster, Meta, Deferred)
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 131-151: `GuessPassType` method checks for `ShadowCaster`/`Caster` (line 136-138), `Meta` (line 139-140), `Deferred` (line 141-142), plus ForwardBase, ForwardAdd, MotionVectors.

assertions.name: Has FindByIndex method
assertions.text: Has FindByIndex method to look up pass metadata by global passIndex
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 67-73: `public static ShaderPassInfo FindByIndex(Shader shader, int passIndex)` iterates extracted passes and returns the one matching `passIndex`.

assertions.name: Has FindBestMatch with priority chain: passName -> lightMode -> PassType
assertions.text: Has fallback matching (FindBestMatch) with priority chain: passName → lightMode → PassType
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 79-104: `FindBestMatch` implements three-step fallback: 1) exact passName match (lines 85-89), 2) lightMode match (lines 92-96), 3) fallback to PassType (lines 99-101).

assertions.name: Keyword normalization splits, sorts, deduplicates
assertions.text: Has keyword normalization: splits string, sorts, deduplicates
assertions.evidence: KeywordUtils.cs lines 38-46: `Normalize(string)` splits by whitespace/semicolon/comma. Lines 21-32: `Normalize(IEnumerable<string>)` trims, deduplicates via HashSet, then sorts via `result.Sort(StringComparer.Ordinal)`.

assertions.name: Composite dedup key includes passIndex AND passName/lightMode
assertions.text: Uses composite key including passIndex AND passName/lightMode for deduplication (not just shader+passType+keywords)
assertions.evidence: VariantRecorder.cs lines 75-81: `DedupKey` property returns `$"{shaderName}|{passIndex}|{kwKey}|{passName}|{lightMode}"` — includes shaderName, passIndex, keywords, passName, AND lightMode.
